# Parkezza

> Curated outdoor site furnishings for resorts, golf courses, developments, municipal facilities, parks, and recreation centers.

Parkezza presents high-end Signature and standard Essential outdoor site furnishing galleries: benches, litter receptacles, shade structures, bollards, dog waste stations, commercial umbrellas, picnic tables, pergolas and trellis, bike racks, flagpoles, and tree guards. Specification support, quantities, and project quotes nationwide.

## Pages

- Home: https://parkezza.com/
- Markets: https://parkezza.com/markets
- About: https://parkezza.com/about
- Quote: https://parkezza.com/quote
- Contact: https://parkezza.com/contact

## Product galleries

- Benches: https://parkezza.com/galleries/benches
- Litter Receptacles: https://parkezza.com/galleries/litter-receptacles
- Shade Structures: https://parkezza.com/galleries/shade-structures
- Bollards: https://parkezza.com/galleries/bollards
- Dog Waste Stations: https://parkezza.com/galleries/dog-waste-stations
- Commercial Umbrellas: https://parkezza.com/galleries/umbrellas
- Picnic Tables: https://parkezza.com/galleries/picnic-tables
- Pergolas Trellis: https://parkezza.com/galleries/pergolas-gazebos
- Bike Racks: https://parkezza.com/galleries/bike-racks
- Flagpoles: https://parkezza.com/galleries/flagpoles
- Tree Guards: https://parkezza.com/galleries/tree-guards
